items.title: Draymond Green Says Jayson Tatum Should Be 'Livid' Over Jaylen Brown 76ers Trade
items.author: The Draymond Green Show
items.body_excerpt: Draymond on Jaylen Brown getting traded to the 76ers "No disrespect to Paul George, but this isn't an even swap, if I'm Jayson Tatum, I'm livid because regardless of what anyone says, we all know the player that Jaylen Brown is and you gonna send this dude to the same division…

items.title: Hollander POTD Larry Bird. Larry Legend was 6th pick in 78, stayed another yr & was ROY in 79-80. Dominated immediately, was 12x all-star, 10x all-NBA, 3x MVP. HOFer & Top 75. This bio is from after 87-88, the last yr of his prime. 4th quarter of Game 7 v Nique was amazing.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Larry Bird. Larry Legend was 6th pick in 78, stayed another yr & was ROY in 79-80. Dominated immediately, was 12x all-star, 10x all-NBA, 3x MVP. HOFer & Top 75. This bio is from after 87-88, the last yr of his prime. 4th quarter of Game 7 v Nique was amazing.
